prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Honda E07Z (660cc turbocharged inline-3)** with a **Garrett GT12 turbocharger** (GT1241Z, 0.42 A/R turbine housing) and **HKS Super SQV4 blow-off valve** for precise boost control at 1.2 bar (17.4 psi). Forged internals include **JE Pistons 87mm forged slugs (8.5:1 compression)** and **Eagle H-beam connecting rods** to handle the increased power. Fueling is upgraded with **Denso 1000cc/min injectors** and a **Walbro 255 lph in-tank fuel pump**, paired with a **Hondata K-Pro ECU (E07Z-specific)** for precise tuning and launch control.

Custom **3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system** by **Fujitsubo Giken** (Acty-specific 4-2-1 header with 1.75-inch primaries) and a **Sparco 2.5-inch straight-pipe muffler** for optimal scavenging without drone. The cooling system is overhauled with a **Koyorad aluminum radiator (Acty-specific, 2-row core)** and **Mishimoto silicone hoses** to prevent heat soak under sustained boost.

Suspension overhaul with **Tein Flex Z coilovers (HA36-specific, 6kg/mm front springs, 4kg/mm rear)** and **Cusco 22mm front sway bar** to reduce body roll. Braking is upgraded with **Project Mu B-Spec pads (Acty-specific)** and **DBA 5000 Series rotors (256mm front, 220mm rear)** for fade-resistant stopping power. The drivetrain is reinforced with a **OS Giken Super Lock LSD (5-speed Acty transmission-specific)** and **Nismo carbon-fiber driveshaft** to handle the torque.
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB Works Acty Truck widebody kit** (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper with integrated tow hooks, and rear overfenders) paired with **Voltex Type-3 rear wing (carbon fiber, 300mm height)** for downforce. The bed is replaced with a **custom aluminum flatbed** (1.2mm thick, powder-coated in **Gloss Gunmetal**) with **LED underglow by Diode Dynamics (Amber/White)** for a low-profile stance.

**Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (15x7 +25 offset, 4x100 PCD)** wrapped in **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires (195/50R15)** for grip. The wheel arches are rolled and pulled by **Auto Drive Japan** to fit the aggressive fitment. Exterior accents include **3M Matte Black vinyl wrap on the roof and hood** with **JDM-spec yellow turn signals (Koito)** and **Seibon carbon fiber side mirrors**.

**Interior stripped and rebuilt with a full **Bride Zeta III bucket seat (Acty-specific mounting brackets)** and **Takata 4-point harness**. The dashboard is replaced with a **Defi Advance BF gauge cluster (boost, oil pressure, water temp)** and a **Sparco Pro2000 steering wheel (350mm, suede)**. The bed is lined with **Line-X XS-100 spray-on bedliner** and fitted with **custom aluminum toolboxes (powder-coated to match the flatbed)** for functionality.
